trigger: Immediately after Phase 7 readiness was reported, the operator commissioned the full rebuild-and-test-everything cycle for tag Lava-Android-1.2.3 and re-issued the verbatim anti-bluff mandate.
operator_verbatim: Rebuild Go API and client app(s), put new builds into releases dir (with properly updated version codes) and execute all existing tests and Challenges! Any issue that pops up MUST BE properly addressed by addressing the root causes (fixing them) and covering everything with validation and verification tests and Challenges! Let us know when we can perform full manual testing of everything! Do not forget to commit and push all submodules and main repo to all upstreams! IMPORTANT: Make sure that all existing tests and Challenges do work in anti-bluff manner - they MUST confirm that all tested codebase really works as expected! ...
scope_directive: Rebuild + test-everything + root-cause-fix any failure + commit + push all upstreams + manual-test handoff

propagation_actions_taken.root_lava_claude_md: §6.L count NINE → TEN + 10th invocation context appended
propagation_actions_taken.submodule_propagation: 16/16 submodules updated: CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, CONSTITUTION.md NINE TIMES → TEN TIMES. Per-submodule commits on lava-pin/2026-05-05-10th-invocation-propagation (15 submodules) or extended lava-pin/2026-05-07-pkg-vm (Containers).
propagation_actions_taken.lava_parent_pin_bumps: 16 submodule gitlinks bumped to the new propagation commits in this Phase R0 commit

outcome: Constitutional propagation mechanically satisfied across all 48 files (16 submodules × 3 files each) + root parent's CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md. The operator's directive that the mandate 'MUST BE part of Constitution of our project ... and to be applied to all Submodules ... as well (if not there already)' continues to be enforced in mechanical lockstep with each new invocation.
anti_bluff_classification: Class III — operator-mandate restatement. Recording every restatement is the load-bearing convention §6.L codifies; the count IS the forensic record.

falsifiability_rehearsal.rule_target: §6.L count propagation across 16 submodules + root for the 10th invocation
falsifiability_rehearsal.mutation: Revert any one submodule's NINE→TEN update or remove the 10th-invocation citation from one file.
falsifiability_rehearsal.covering_check: scripts/check-constitution.sh §6.L count check (when it exists; today the propagation discipline is operator-led + grep-based via the per-commit verification pattern). Future enforcement: pre-push Check 6 grep'ing the count phrase across all 48 files.
falsifiability_rehearsal.observed_failure_class: Manual review (and the 11th invocation that would surely follow if propagation were silently skipped) detects the gap.
falsifiability_rehearsal.bluff_classification: Constitution-propagation drift — the bluff vector here is 'agent says the propagation is done but only edited some files'. The 16-row pin-bump table above IS the per-file rehearsal evidence: each post-SHA represents a real commit visible at each submodule's mirror, providing per-submodule auditability.
falsifiability_rehearsal.rehearsal_evidence_anchor: The 16-row submodule_pin_bumps table above; every post-SHA verifiable via `git ls-remote <submodule-mirror> refs/heads/lava-pin/2026-05-05-10th-invocation-propagation` (or lava-pin/2026-05-07-pkg-vm for Containers) returning the exact same SHA the table records.

Bluff_Audit.test: Per-submodule live ls-remote convergence after 10th-invocation propagation
Bluff_Audit.mutation: Skip the constitution edit in any one of 48 files, OR fail to push one of 23 mirror destinations.
Bluff_Audit.observed: 16-row table inspection would show a missing post-SHA OR a mismatched mirror SHA.

next_phases_committed: Phase R1 — Bump version codes (Android 1.2.3/1023; api-go; proxy)
Phase R2 — Build all artifacts via build_and_release.sh into releases/
Phase R3 — Run all hermetic test suites (Containers + Lava + lava-api-go + 16 submodules)
Phase R6 — Address every failure via root-cause fix + regression test + commit
Phase R7 — Final commit + push everything to all 4 mirrors + manual-test handoff
